summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Soul Food soft launch V2 features. Fixed bug in Breakfast month dropdown (Month 2/3 were not disabled). All 10 test features now verified working. Backend API returns correct 20% off game pass pricing with promo_active=true. Frontend displays correct banners, pricing, and availability restrictions.

issues: Landing page uses different component (SoulFoodApp.js) than App.js LandingPage. The 'Soul Food Is LIVE! He Is Risen!' and 'Game Passes 20% Off — No Coupon Needed!' notices are in App.js LandingPage but not in SoulFoodApp.js which is actually rendered at /

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add 'Soul Food Is LIVE! He Is Risen!' and 'Game Passes 20% Off — No Coupon Needed!' notices to SoulFoodApp.js landing page if desired (currently only in App.js LandingPage which is not rendered)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Breakfast month dropdown was not disabling Month 2/3 - added available check similar to lesson dropdown
Backend game_pass_30 and game_pass_90 correctly have promo_sale_price and promo_until fields
Frontend gamingPasses array correctly calculates 20% off prices based on PENTECOST_DATE
Breakfast lessons correctly show Month 1 (Prayer) as available and Month 2/3 as 'Coming Soon' disabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: All soft launch V2 features verified working. Fixed month dropdown bug. Backend API at /api/payments/products returns game_pass_30 with sale_price=6.39 and game_pass_90 with sale_price=19.99, both with promo_active=true. Frontend Quick Order page shows all required banners, pricing, and availability restrictions.

breakfast_lessons_month1_available.details: Esther, Solomon, Jesus, Paul & Silas lessons are ENABLED and selectable

breakfast_lessons_month2_3_disabled.details: Month 2 (Through) and Month 3 (Faith) lessons show as 'Coming Soon' and are DISABLED

breakfast_snack_pack_month1_available.details: Month 1: Prayer, the First Resort is ENABLED

breakfast_snack_pack_month2_3_disabled.details: Month 2 and Month 3 now show as 'Coming Soon' and are DISABLED after fix

game_pass_30_day_price.details: Shows $6.39 (20% off $7.99) with crossed-out original price and SAVE 20% badge

game_pass_90_day_price.details: Shows $19.99 (20% off $24.99) with crossed-out original price and SAVE 20% badge

gaming_section_20_off_badge.details: Gaming section header shows '20% OFF — No Coupon Needed!' badge

backend_api_promo_active.details: game_pass_30: sale_price=6.39, promo_active=true; game_pass_90: sale_price=19.99, promo_active=true

pentecost_countdown_banner.details: Banner shows 'Early Bird ends Pentecost:' with days/hrs/min countdown

he_is_risen_banner.details: Quick Order page shows 'He Is Risen! Soul Food Is LIVE!' banner

holiday_lessons_available.details: Covenant, Cradle, Cross, Comforter all ENABLED and selectable

mobile_responsiveness.details: Quick Order page at 375px width: no horizontal overflow, cards stack properly

landing_page_hero.details: Hero mentions 'Holiday is live — Break*fast & Lunch pre-orders now open!'

bug_fixed.description: Breakfast Snack Pack month dropdown was not disabling Month 2 and Month 3
bug_fixed.fix: Added available check to month dropdown similar to lesson dropdown - now shows 'Coming Soon' separator and disabled options for unavailable months

frontend_ui_tests: Banner 'He Is Risen! Soul Food Is LIVE!' displayed
Gaming '20% OFF — No Coupon Needed!' badge
Breakfast Month 2/3 lessons (8) disabled with 'Coming Soon'
Mobile responsiveness at 375px - no overflow, cards stack
